tldr.title: Claude Fable 5
tldr.author: Philpax
bullets: Anthropic's Claude 3.5 Sonnet operates at twice the speed of Claude 3 Opus and at one-fifth of the cost.
It scores 49% on SWE-bench, outperforming Claude 3 Opus (38%) and GPT-4o (27%) in software engineering tasks.
Evaluations by US and UK Safety Institutes confirmed Claude 3.5 Sonnet remains at ASL-2, presenting low CBRN risk.
